title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 43.195 - Authority to arrest upon reasonable grounds for motor vehicle violations
text:
43.195.  Authority to arrest upon reasonable grounds for motor vehicle violations. — Any member of the Missouri state highway patrol may arrest on view, and without a warrant, any person he sees violating or who he has reasonable grounds to believe has violated any law of this state relating to the operation of motor vehicles.
(L. 1965 p. 150 § 1)
